title: Remove auto dropdown list of users after a user has been selected

posts.author: tmanney (Theresa)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello wonderful monday team! I’ve noticed a small ux annoyance when using your tool.
Feature suggestion:
In the modal that pops up when adding users to a team, it would be great if the “Add” button were more accessible.

Current behavior:
The dropdown covers the “Add” button when the dropdown is selected. After selecting a user to be added to the team, the dropdown remains keeping the “Add” button hidden. Currently you have to click within the modal and then you can click the “Add” button.
If you mistakenly click outside of the modal or hit ‘esc’ on your keyboard, it closes out of the modal without adding any users.. forcing me to have to restart the action I was attempting.
